mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_mbr_acct ( lgn_id, pwd, email, role, created_by ) VALUES ( #{lgnId}, #{pwd}, #{email}, #{role}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT mbr_acct_idx AS idx, mbr_acct_uuid AS uuid, lgn_id, pwd, email, role, acct_stat, lgn_fail_cnt, lck_yn, lck_at, otp_enabled, otp_secret, otp_fail_cnt, otp_last_failed_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, del_at FROM tb_mbr_acct WHERE lgn_id = #{lgnId} AND del_at IS NULL

SELECT mbr_acct_idx AS idx, mbr_acct_uuid AS uuid, lgn_id, pwd, email, role, acct_stat, lgn_fail_cnt, lck_yn, lck_at, otp_enabled, otp_secret, otp_fail_cnt, otp_last_failed_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, del_at FROM tb_mbr_acct WHERE mbr_acct_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL

SELECT mbr_acct_idx AS idx, mbr_acct_uuid AS uuid, lgn_id, pwd, email, role, acct_stat, lgn_fail_cnt, lck_yn, lck_at, otp_enabled, otp_secret, otp_fail_cnt, otp_last_failed_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, del_at FROM tb_mbr_acct WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET email = #{email}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET del_at = now(), updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET lgn_fail_cnt = lgn_fail_cnt + 1, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET lck_yn = TRUE, lck_at = now(), updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET lgn_fail_cnt = 0, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET lgn_fail_cnt = 0, lck_yn = FALSE, lck_at = NULL, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET otp_secret = #{otpSecret}, otp_enabled = FALSE, otp_fail_cnt = 0, otp_last_failed_at = NULL, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET otp_enabled = TRUE, otp_fail_cnt = 0, otp_last_failed_at = NULL, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET otp_enabled = FALSE, otp_secret = NULL, otp_fail_cnt = 0, otp_last_failed_at = NULL, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL

UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET otp_fail_cnt = otp_fail_cnt + 1, otp_last_failed_at = CASE WHEN otp_fail_cnt + 1 >= 5 THEN now() ELSE otp_last_failed_at END, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET otp_fail_cnt = 0, otp_last_failed_at = NULL, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET otp_fail_cnt = 0, otp_last_failed_at = NULL, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL

UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET otp_enabled = FALSE, otp_secret = NULL, otp_fail_cnt = 0, otp_last_failed_at = NULL, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET pwd = #{pwd}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_idx = #{idx} AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET pwd = #{pwd}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET role = #{role}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
UPDATE tb_mbr_acct SET acct_stat = #{acctStat}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = now() WHERE mbr_acct_uuid = CAST(#{uuid} AS UUID) AND del_at IS NULL
